request_payload.exposure_text: I've been thinking about our alliance commitments lately. It's easy to forget how much security we get from working together. Remember when we all pulled together during the 2020 pandemic? That's the kind of solidarity we need in defense too. Our partners have our backs when it counts, and we should have theirs. #StrongerTogether #AllianceMatters
